'''鈭歴h-d-n-k''' ('''kashadnekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lactolate|lactolate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-d-n-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lactolate|lactolate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-d-n-k
|-
! Lemma
| kashadnekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
